rationale: Keep: the cited paper’s core contribution is a method to retrieve unobserved consideration sets from household panel choices, which directly matches the citing paper’s stated gap about prior approaches that infer choice sets from purchases under strong assumptions. Given this close methodological overlap (choice-set heterogeneity/consideration modeling) and an exact DOI match in the reference list (10.1509/jmkr.47.1.63), this is plausibly a substantive method/foundation citation rather than an incidental mention.
